_note: Rashi (zodiac sign) mantra pages. Rashi->ruling planet is [confirmed classical] (BPHS Ch.4). The remedial mantra = the ruling planet's mantra; mapping rashi to that remedy is [modern convention] built on confirmed rulership (NOT a verbatim scriptural prescription — stated on-page). Mantra Devanagari copied from anchors; homoglyph-gated. Lagna shares the same ruler, so Lagna gets ONE explainer page, not 12.

rashis.whatIs: The zodiac opens with Mesha, and it opens with fire. Aries is the ram — first to move, first to act, ruled by Mars, the planet of raw initiative. When your Moon or ascendant sits here, the traditional way to support the chart is to strengthen that ruler, so the mantra you turn to is Mars's own: "Om Bhaumaya Namah", or the fuller bija "Om Kraam Kreem Kraum Sah Bhaumaya Namah". Worth saying plainly: linking a sign to its lord's mantra is a working convention astrologers built on the classical rulership, not a verse quoted from scripture.

mantras.textDevanagari: ॐ भौमाय नमः
mantras.transliteration: Om Bhaumaya Namah
mantras.source: Ruling planet Mangal (BPHS rulership of Mesha)
mantras.englishExplanation: The Mars name mantra, ruler of Mesha; chanted to strengthen the sign's lord.

mantras.textDevanagari: ॐ क्रां क्रीं क्रौं सः भौमाय नमः
mantras.transliteration: Om Kraam Kreem Kraum Sah Bhaumaya Namah
mantras.source: Mantra Mahodadhi (Mangal bija)
mantras.englishExplanation: The tantric Mars bija for Mesha natives, best under a guru.

benefits: Strengthens the sign-lord Mars
Traditionally for courage, drive, and Mangal-related concerns

guruDiksha.note: Name mantra open; bija under a guru.

faqs.question: Which mantra is for Mesha (Aries) rashi?
faqs.answer: Mesha is ruled by Mars, so the Mars mantra is used: "Om Bhaumaya Namah", or the bija "Om Kraam Kreem Kraum Sah Bhaumaya Namah". This follows the planet that rules the sign.

faqs.question: Which planet rules Aries?
faqs.answer: Mars (Mangal) rules Aries (Mesha) in classical Vedic astrology per the Brihat Parashara Hora Shastra.

rashis.whatIs: Where Aries rushes, Taurus settles. The bull is an earth sign that values steadiness, comfort and the good things that last — fitting for a sign ruled by Venus, planet of beauty and ease. If your Moon or ascendant falls in Vrishabha, supporting Venus is the traditional route, and the mantra for that is "Om Shukraya Namah", or its seed form "Om Draam Dreem Draum Sah Shukraya Namah". As with every sign, pairing the rashi with its lord's mantra is a convention astrologers drew from classical rulership rather than a line of scripture.

mantras.textDevanagari: ॐ शुक्राय नमः
mantras.transliteration: Om Shukraya Namah
mantras.source: Ruling planet Shukra (BPHS rulership of Vrishabha)
mantras.englishExplanation: The Venus name mantra, ruler of Vrishabha.

mantras.textDevanagari: ॐ द्रां द्रीं द्रौं सः शुक्राय नमः
mantras.transliteration: Om Draam Dreem Draum Sah Shukraya Namah
mantras.source: Mantra Mahodadhi (Shukra bija)
mantras.englishExplanation: The tantric Venus bija for Vrishabha natives.

benefits: Strengthens the sign-lord Venus
Traditionally for harmony, comfort, and relationships

faqs.question: Which mantra is for Vrishabha (Taurus) rashi?
faqs.answer: Vrishabha is ruled by Venus, so the Venus mantra is used: "Om Shukraya Namah", or the bija "Om Draam Dreem Draum Sah Shukraya Namah".

faqs.question: Which planet rules Taurus?
faqs.answer: Venus (Shukra) rules Taurus (Vrishabha) in classical Vedic astrology.

rashis.whatIs: Mithuna is the sign of two — the twins, curiosity in human form. It is an air sign ruled by Mercury, and that pairing shows up as quick wit, easy talk, and a mind that likes to hold several things at once. For a Mithuna Moon or ascendant, the way to steady all that motion is to strengthen Mercury, so the mantra is Budha's: "Om Budhaya Namah", or the bija "Om Braam Breem Braum Sah Budhaya Namah". The sign-to-mantra link here, as elsewhere, rests on classical rulership and on tradition, not on a specific scriptural verse.

mantras.textDevanagari: ॐ बुधाय नमः
mantras.transliteration: Om Budhaya Namah
mantras.source: Ruling planet Budha (BPHS rulership of Mithuna)
mantras.englishExplanation: The Mercury name mantra, ruler of Mithuna.

mantras.textDevanagari: ॐ ब्रां ब्रीं ब्रौं सः बुधाय नमः
mantras.transliteration: Om Braam Breem Braum Sah Budhaya Namah
mantras.source: Mantra Mahodadhi (Budha bija)
mantras.englishExplanation: The tantric Mercury bija for Mithuna natives.

benefits: Strengthens the sign-lord Mercury
Traditionally for intellect, communication, and learning

faqs.question: Which mantra is for Mithuna (Gemini) rashi?
faqs.answer: Mithuna is ruled by Mercury, so the Mercury mantra is used: "Om Budhaya Namah", or the bija "Om Braam Breem Braum Sah Budhaya Namah".

faqs.question: Which planet rules Gemini?
faqs.answer: Mercury (Budha) rules Gemini (Mithuna) in classical Vedic astrology.

rashis.whatIs: Karka is the only sign the Moon rules outright, and it shows. Cancer is the crab — protective shell outside, deep feeling within — a water sign tuned to home, mother, and memory. When the Moon that governs it is also your Moon or ascendant, emotional weather can run high, and the traditional steadying practice is the Moon's own mantra: "Om Chandraya Namah", or the seed form "Om Shraam Shreem Shraum Sah Chandraya Namah". Treat the sign-and-mantra pairing as the working convention it is — built on classical rulership, not quoted from a text.

mantras.textDevanagari: ॐ चन्द्राय नमः
mantras.transliteration: Om Chandraya Namah
mantras.source: Ruling planet Chandra (BPHS rulership of Karka)
mantras.englishExplanation: The Moon name mantra, ruler of Karka.

mantras.textDevanagari: ॐ श्रां श्रीं श्रौं सः चन्द्राय नमः
mantras.transliteration: Om Shraam Shreem Shraum Sah Chandraya Namah
mantras.source: Mantra Mahodadhi (Chandra bija)
mantras.englishExplanation: The tantric Moon bija for Karka natives.

benefits: Strengthens the sign-lord Moon
Traditionally for emotional calm and intuition

faqs.question: Which mantra is for Karka (Cancer) rashi?
faqs.answer: Karka is ruled by the Moon, so the Moon mantra is used: "Om Chandraya Namah", or the bija "Om Shraam Shreem Shraum Sah Chandraya Namah".

faqs.question: Which planet rules Cancer?
faqs.answer: The Moon (Chandra) rules Cancer (Karka) in classical Vedic astrology.

rashis.whatIs: Leo is ruled by the Sun, and a sign ruled by a king behaves like one. Simha is the lion — dignity, warmth, the wish to lead and be seen to lead. Strength here is real, but so is the cost when the Sun behind it is weak, and pride turns brittle. For a Simha Moon or ascendant, the traditional support is the Sun's mantra: "Om Suryaya Namah", or the bija "Om Hraam Hreem Hraum Sah Suryaya Namah", ideally at sunrise. The pairing of sign and mantra follows classical rulership and long practice rather than a scriptural line.

mantras.textDevanagari: ॐ सूर्याय नमः
mantras.transliteration: Om Suryaya Namah
mantras.source: Ruling planet Surya (BPHS rulership of Simha)
mantras.englishExplanation: The Sun name mantra, ruler of Simha.

mantras.textDevanagari: ॐ ह्रां ह्रीं ह्रौं सः सूर्याय नमः
mantras.transliteration: Om Hraam Hreem Hraum Sah Suryaya Namah
mantras.source: Mantra Mahodadhi (Surya bija)
mantras.englishExplanation: The tantric Sun bija for Simha natives.

benefits: Strengthens the sign-lord Sun
Traditionally for vitality, authority, and confidence

faqs.question: Which mantra is for Simha (Leo) rashi?
faqs.answer: Simha is ruled by the Sun, so the Sun mantra is used: "Om Suryaya Namah", or the bija "Om Hraam Hreem Hraum Sah Suryaya Namah".

faqs.question: Which planet rules Leo?
faqs.answer: The Sun (Surya) rules Leo (Simha) in classical Vedic astrology.

rashis.whatIs: Mercury rules two signs, and Kanya is its quieter, more exacting side. Virgo is the maiden — discernment, attention to detail, the instinct to refine and put right. It is earth where Gemini was air, so the same Mercurial intelligence turns practical and precise. A Kanya Moon or ascendant is supported, traditionally, by strengthening Mercury through its mantra: "Om Budhaya Namah", or the bija "Om Braam Breem Braum Sah Budhaya Namah". The sign-to-mantra mapping is convention grounded in classical rulership, offered as practice rather than scripture.

mantras.textDevanagari: ॐ बुधाय नमः
mantras.transliteration: Om Budhaya Namah
mantras.source: Ruling planet Budha (BPHS rulership of Kanya)
mantras.englishExplanation: The Mercury name mantra, ruler of Kanya.

mantras.textDevanagari: ॐ ब्रां ब्रीं ब्रौं सः बुधाय नमः
mantras.transliteration: Om Braam Breem Braum Sah Budhaya Namah
mantras.source: Mantra Mahodadhi (Budha bija)
mantras.englishExplanation: The tantric Mercury bija for Kanya natives.

benefits: Strengthens the sign-lord Mercury
Traditionally for intellect, analysis, and skill

faqs.question: Which mantra is for Kanya (Virgo) rashi?
faqs.answer: Kanya is ruled by Mercury, so the Mercury mantra is used: "Om Budhaya Namah", or the bija "Om Braam Breem Braum Sah Budhaya Namah".

faqs.question: Which planet rules Virgo?
faqs.answer: Mercury (Budha) rules Virgo (Kanya) in classical Vedic astrology.

rashis.whatIs: Tula is the one sign represented not by a creature but by an object — the balance, the scales. Libra weighs, compares, seeks fairness and partnership, and it is ruled by Venus in its more social, relational mode. When your Moon or ascendant sits in Tula, the traditional way to keep that balance true is to strengthen Venus with its mantra: "Om Shukraya Namah", or the bija "Om Draam Dreem Draum Sah Shukraya Namah". As always, the sign-and-mantra link is a convention drawn from classical rulership, not a quoted verse.

mantras.textDevanagari: ॐ शुक्राय नमः
mantras.transliteration: Om Shukraya Namah
mantras.source: Ruling planet Shukra (BPHS rulership of Tula)
mantras.englishExplanation: The Venus name mantra, ruler of Tula.

mantras.textDevanagari: ॐ द्रां द्रीं द्रौं सः शुक्राय नमः
mantras.transliteration: Om Draam Dreem Draum Sah Shukraya Namah
mantras.source: Mantra Mahodadhi (Shukra bija)
mantras.englishExplanation: The tantric Venus bija for Tula natives.

benefits: Strengthens the sign-lord Venus
Traditionally for harmony, partnership, and balance

faqs.question: Which mantra is for Tula (Libra) rashi?
faqs.answer: Tula is ruled by Venus, so the Venus mantra is used: "Om Shukraya Namah", or the bija "Om Draam Dreem Draum Sah Shukraya Namah".

faqs.question: Which planet rules Libra?
faqs.answer: Venus (Shukra) rules Libra (Tula) in classical Vedic astrology.

rashis.whatIs: Vrishchika is Mars working in deep water. Scorpio keeps the planet's intensity but turns it inward — secretive, probing, capable of real transformation and of holding a grudge for years. Classical astrology gives the sign to Mars (modern writers add Ketu as a co-lord, a later convention). For a Vrishchika Moon or ascendant, the traditional support is the Mars mantra: "Om Bhaumaya Namah", or the bija "Om Kraam Kreem Kraum Sah Bhaumaya Namah". Pairing the sign with its lord's mantra is practice built on classical rulership rather than a scriptural instruction.

mantras.textDevanagari: ॐ भौमाय नमः
mantras.transliteration: Om Bhaumaya Namah
mantras.source: Ruling planet Mangal (BPHS rulership of Vrishchika)
mantras.englishExplanation: The Mars name mantra, ruler of Vrishchika.

mantras.textDevanagari: ॐ क्रां क्रीं क्रौं सः भौमाय नमः
mantras.transliteration: Om Kraam Kreem Kraum Sah Bhaumaya Namah
mantras.source: Mantra Mahodadhi (Mangal bija)
mantras.englishExplanation: The tantric Mars bija for Vrishchika natives.

benefits: Strengthens the sign-lord Mars
Traditionally for courage, resilience, and transformation

faqs.question: Which mantra is for Vrishchika (Scorpio) rashi?
faqs.answer: Vrishchika is ruled by Mars, so the Mars mantra is used: "Om Bhaumaya Namah", or the bija "Om Kraam Kreem Kraum Sah Bhaumaya Namah".

faqs.question: Which planet rules Scorpio?
faqs.answer: Mars (Mangal) rules Scorpio (Vrishchika) in classical Vedic astrology (Ketu is a modern co-ruler convention).

rashis.whatIs: The archer of Dhanu aims at something far off — meaning, truth, the next horizon. Sagittarius is a fire sign ruled by Jupiter, and it carries Jupiter's love of philosophy, travel and teaching. A Dhanu Moon or ascendant tends toward optimism and the big picture, sometimes at the expense of detail. To support the sign, tradition strengthens its lord with the Jupiter mantra: "Om Gurave Namah", or the bija "Om Graam Greem Graum Sah Gurave Namah". The sign-to-mantra pairing is, once more, a working convention from classical rulership.

mantras.textDevanagari: ॐ गुरवे नमः
mantras.transliteration: Om Gurave Namah
mantras.source: Ruling planet Guru (BPHS rulership of Dhanu)
mantras.englishExplanation: The Jupiter name mantra, ruler of Dhanu.

mantras.textDevanagari: ॐ ग्रां ग्रीं ग्रौं सः गुरवे नमः
mantras.transliteration: Om Graam Greem Graum Sah Gurave Namah
mantras.source: Mantra Mahodadhi (Guru bija)
mantras.englishExplanation: The tantric Jupiter bija for Dhanu natives.

benefits: Strengthens the sign-lord Jupiter
Traditionally for wisdom, dharma, and fortune

faqs.question: Which mantra is for Dhanu (Sagittarius) rashi?
faqs.answer: Dhanu is ruled by Jupiter, so the Jupiter mantra is used: "Om Gurave Namah", or the bija "Om Graam Greem Graum Sah Gurave Namah".

faqs.question: Which planet rules Sagittarius?
faqs.answer: Jupiter (Guru/Brihaspati) rules Sagittarius (Dhanu) in classical Vedic astrology.

rashis.whatIs: Makara rewards the long game. Capricorn is the disciplined climber of the zodiac, an earth sign ruled by Saturn, and it carries Saturn's patience, ambition and respect for structure. People with this sign strong tend to build slowly and last. When Makara holds your Moon or ascendant, the traditional support is Saturn's mantra: "Om Shanaischaraya Namah", or the bija "Om Praam Preem Praum Sah Shanaischaraya Namah". Tying the sign to its lord's mantra is convention rooted in classical rulership, not a verse of scripture.

mantras.textDevanagari: ॐ शनैश्चराय नमः
mantras.transliteration: Om Shanaischaraya Namah
mantras.source: Ruling planet Shani (BPHS rulership of Makara)
mantras.englishExplanation: The Saturn name mantra, ruler of Makara.

mantras.textDevanagari: ॐ प्रां प्रीं प्रौं सः शनैश्चराय नमः
mantras.transliteration: Om Praam Preem Praum Sah Shanaischaraya Namah
mantras.source: Mantra Mahodadhi (Shani bija)
mantras.englishExplanation: The tantric Saturn bija for Makara natives.

benefits: Strengthens the sign-lord Saturn
Traditionally for discipline, patience, and steady progress

faqs.question: Which mantra is for Makara (Capricorn) rashi?
faqs.answer: Makara is ruled by Saturn, so the Saturn mantra is used: "Om Shanaischaraya Namah", or the bija "Om Praam Preem Praum Sah Shanaischaraya Namah".

faqs.question: Which planet rules Capricorn?
faqs.answer: Saturn (Shani) rules Capricorn (Makara) in classical Vedic astrology.

rashis.whatIs: Saturn rules two signs, and Kumbha is its inventive, outward-looking face. Aquarius is the water-bearer — an air sign concerned with society, ideas and the collective rather than the self. The same Saturnine discipline that makes Capricorn a builder makes Aquarius a reformer. (Modern astrology adds Rahu as a co-ruler; classical texts keep it with Saturn.) For a Kumbha Moon or ascendant, the traditional support is the Saturn mantra: "Om Shanaischaraya Namah", or the bija "Om Praam Preem Praum Sah Shanaischaraya Namah" — a sign-to-mantra link of convention, not scripture.

mantras.textDevanagari: ॐ शनैश्चराय नमः
mantras.transliteration: Om Shanaischaraya Namah
mantras.source: Ruling planet Shani (BPHS rulership of Kumbha)
mantras.englishExplanation: The Saturn name mantra, ruler of Kumbha.

mantras.textDevanagari: ॐ प्रां प्रीं प्रौं सः शनैश्चराय नमः
mantras.transliteration: Om Praam Preem Praum Sah Shanaischaraya Namah
mantras.source: Mantra Mahodadhi (Shani bija)
mantras.englishExplanation: The tantric Saturn bija for Kumbha natives.

benefits: Strengthens the sign-lord Saturn
Traditionally for perseverance, vision, and steady effort

faqs.question: Which mantra is for Kumbha (Aquarius) rashi?
faqs.answer: Kumbha is ruled by Saturn, so the Saturn mantra is used: "Om Shanaischaraya Namah", or the bija "Om Praam Preem Praum Sah Shanaischaraya Namah".

faqs.question: Which planet rules Aquarius?
faqs.answer: Saturn (Shani) rules Aquarius (Kumbha) in classical Vedic astrology (Rahu is a modern co-ruler convention).

rashis.whatIs: The zodiac closes the way it dissolves — into Meena, the two fish swimming in opposite directions. Pisces is the most inward sign, a watery house of imagination, compassion and surrender, ruled by Jupiter in its gentlest, most devotional mode. A Meena Moon or ascendant often feels the world's currents more than most. To steady that sensitivity, tradition strengthens Jupiter with its mantra: "Om Gurave Namah", or the bija "Om Graam Greem Graum Sah Gurave Namah". As with all twelve signs, the pairing is a convention from classical rulership rather than a scriptural command.

mantras.textDevanagari: ॐ गुरवे नमः
mantras.transliteration: Om Gurave Namah
mantras.source: Ruling planet Guru (BPHS rulership of Meena)
mantras.englishExplanation: The Jupiter name mantra, ruler of Meena.

mantras.textDevanagari: ॐ ग्रां ग्रीं ग्रौं सः गुरवे नमः
mantras.transliteration: Om Graam Greem Graum Sah Gurave Namah
mantras.source: Mantra Mahodadhi (Guru bija)
mantras.englishExplanation: The tantric Jupiter bija for Meena natives.

benefits: Strengthens the sign-lord Jupiter
Traditionally for wisdom, devotion, and spiritual growth

faqs.question: Which mantra is for Meena (Pisces) rashi?
faqs.answer: Meena is ruled by Jupiter, so the Jupiter mantra is used: "Om Gurave Namah", or the bija "Om Graam Greem Graum Sah Gurave Namah".

faqs.question: Which planet rules Pisces?
faqs.answer: Jupiter (Guru/Brihaspati) rules Pisces (Meena) in classical Vedic astrology.
